code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut prev = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  if first or tok != prev
    if first
      result = "#{tok}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{tok}"
    end
    prev = tok
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
